body:
This PR (i) fixes typos in eqs.(34), (37), and (42).

Also, it changes `v` to `υ` which (in the particular font used in the docs) it renders much better and does not lead to confusion with `\nu`.

Regarding factors of `1/ρ0`: I added them in eqs. (1)-(2) to be consistent with eqs. (7)-(8).
But still the issue #222 remains: eq. (13) can't be true if pressure has units of Pa.
title: Polishing docs
